title: stelis thecoglossa
intro: Stelis thecoglossa is a species of orchid that is native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Stelis thecoglossa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
